name: hera-unity
description: Low-token live Unity Editor workflows through the Hera CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Control and verify a live Unity Editor with a low-token CLI.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to a running Unity Editor through the Hera CLI to inspect scenes, edit objects and assets, run tests, drive Play Mode, and verify results against live Editor state.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Hera Unity to inspect the running Unity Editor, make the requested change, and verify the result.
